offer: For property managers processing 10–20 properties/month, inefficient reporting causes delays in tenant communication. We automate report generation instead of manual report generation using templates and spreadsheets.
problem: Inefficient manual reporting processes lead to delays in property inspections.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property managers' advice
Indie Hackers discussions on similar challenges
DM outreach to property managers with demo video
Community forums for property management tools sharing
try_it: Let users try template-based report generation and checklists on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant communities
